description: Defines route naming, route-handler responsibilities, and API path ownership.

rules.name: Route paths use centralized constants
rules.description: Backend route registries must use centralized API path constants instead of hardcoded route strings.

rules.name: Route handlers use mapper-created DTOs
rules.description: Route handlers must convert path parameters and payloads into request DTOs through mapper functions before calling services.

rules.name: Routes return consistent JSON envelopes
rules.description: Routes should return consistent JSON envelopes containing success, message/error, and resource-specific response fields.

rules.name: Module routes stay in module registries
rules.description: Module-owned routes must be registered in the module route registry rather than the core/platform route registry.

rules.name: Route paths use kebab-case
rules.description: API URL path segments must use kebab-case.

rules.name: Routes should remain transport-focused
rules.description: Route handlers should focus on HTTP transport concerns such as request reading, validation coordination, DTO mapping, authentication/authorization integration, and response sending, while delegating business workflows to services.
